title: dianthus brachycalyx
intro: Dianthus brachycalyx, also known as the short-fruited pink, is a flowering plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Dianthus brachycalyx can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
